modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to convert a table to text in Word.

full_description_text: The user is trying to convert a table into text in Word but is having trouble. They are unsure of how to do this and need assistance. This issue is causing a delay in their work.
short_description: Unable to convert a table to text in Word.
description: The user is trying to convert a table into text in Word but is having trouble. They are unsure of how to do this and need assistance. This issue is causing a delay in their work.
